subsection.heading: Functions relating to programs for the education of migrant and seasonal farmworkers

content.p: Notwithstanding the provisions of section 601 of this Act, there shall be transferred to the Secretary, at such time on or after May 4, 1980, as the Secretary certifies that there has been established in the Department a single component responsible for the administration and the coordination of programs relating to the education of migrants, all functions of the Secretary of Labor or the Department of Labor relating to such education.
The Secretary is authorized to conduct the functions transferred by subsection (a).

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Section 601 of this Act, referred to in subsec. (a), is section 601 of Pub. L. 96–88, which is set out as an Effective Date note under section 3401 of this title.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 302 of Pub. L. 96–88 was classified to section 3442 of this title prior to repeal by Pub. L. 99–145.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1998—Subsec. (a). Pub. L. 105–277 substituted “relating to such education” for “under section 303(c)(2) of the Comprehensive Employment and Training Act”.
